description: Source-ledger contract for the Enneagram result-page agent validator harness. This is scaffold and provenance only.

sources.title: Enneagram V2 runtime registry manifest
permitted_use: Verify that a provided candidate is checked against the expected runtime registry hash.
limitations: Evidence-only in this PR; no runtime switch is allowed.
disallowed_use: Do not activate or mutate runtime rows from this ledger.

copy_policy.notes: Registry manifest is a hash contract, not public result copy.

claim_trace_requirements: Candidate validation must compare the runtime registry hash to this ledger row.

evidence_refs.summary: Expected runtime registry hash for a9fd baseline validation.
limitations: Does not imply runtime activation.

sources.title: E105 compiled question contract
permitted_use: Preserve E105 as the primary result source boundary for result-page copy.
limitations: Does not authorize deterministic typing, diagnosis, or E105 versus FC144 score comparison.
disallowed_use: Do not claim that E105 and FC144 scores are directly comparable.

copy_policy.notes: Question contract only; not reusable public copy.

claim_trace_requirements: Every E105 method claim must retain the question-boundary limitation.

evidence_refs.summary: E105 remains the primary current result flow boundary.
limitations: No score-comparison claim is allowed.

sources.title: FC144 compiled question contract
permitted_use: Frame FC144 only as a second lens or follow-up exploration boundary.
limitations: FC144 must not be positioned as more accurate, replacement, final typing, or score-superiority evidence.
disallowed_use: Do not claim FC144 replaces or corrects the E105 result.

copy_policy.notes: Question contract only; not reusable public copy.

claim_trace_requirements: Every FC144 claim must include the second-lens limitation.

evidence_refs.summary: FC144 is bounded to second-lens language.
limitations: No accuracy-superiority or replacement-result claim is allowed.

sources.title: Phase8B a9fd candidate baseline contract
permitted_use: Validate a provided candidate directory against the approved a9fd baseline contract.
limitations: This ledger does not store candidate payloads and does not prove a candidate directory exists locally.
disallowed_use: Do not treat another manifest hash as a silent substitute for a9fd.
claim_trace_requirements: Candidate validation must compare manifest SHA, runtime registry SHA, payload count, launch scope, and out-of-launch scope.

evidence_refs.summary: a9fd is the current approved candidate baseline after the unrecovered prior tmp candidate.
limitations: No candidate payloads are committed in this PR.

sources.title: Batch 1R-A asset stream
permitted_use: Trace candidate payloads to launch-scope asset stream 1R-A.
limitations: Logical provenance only; no external asset JSON is copied into this repo.
disallowed_use: Do not expose machine-local source paths or private working notes.

copy_policy.notes: Asset stream row is provenance only.

claim_trace_requirements: Every payload derived from this stream must map back to the stream id and source checksum.

limitations: No public copy is authorized by the ledger row alone.

sources.title: FC144 boundary policy
permitted_use: Validate that FC144 language stays second-lens only.
limitations: Policy row only; not public copy.
disallowed_use: No FC144 accuracy-superiority, replacement-result, final-typing, or direct score-comparison claim.
claim_trace_requirements: Every FC144 candidate payload must pass the boundary validator.

evidence_refs.summary: Validator requires FC144 boundary violation count to be zero.
limitations: Does not activate or import content.

sources.title: Forbidden claim policy
permitted_use: Validate that candidate payloads do not contain forbidden claim families or private metadata leakage.
limitations: Policy row only; future content generation still needs separate source-backed review.
disallowed_use: No diagnostic, hiring, final typing, fixed certainty, score-comparison, FC144 replacement, prediction, or private identifier leakage.
claim_trace_requirements: Every candidate payload must pass metadata leakage and forbidden claim scans before import QA.

evidence_refs.summary: Validator requires forbidden claim and metadata leakage hit counts to be zero.
limitations: Does not generate or approve new content by itself.
